Race-contextual favorable independent expenditures: direct 24E support for candidate plus 24A opposition to other candidates in the same House race
Race-contextual unfavorable independent expenditures: direct 24A opposition to candidate plus 24E support for other candidates in the same House race
Race-contextual favorable communication costs: direct 24F communication costs for candidate plus 24N communication costs against other candidates in the same House race
Race-contextual unfavorable communication costs: direct 24N communication costs against candidate plus 24F communication costs for other candidates in the same House race
Direct coordinated party expenditures for the candidate using transaction type 24C
